hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE '^git commit' && { ruff check . || echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"ruff check failed — fix lint errors before committing"}'; } || true

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^(git (push|tag |reset --hard)|gh (release (create|delete)|pr (merge|close)))'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"⛔ %s — irreversible action, needs user confirmation"}}\n' "$CMD"; fi
